LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 8, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER HEARING SET FOR APR-08-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,968,702 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS MUST POST AN UNDERTAKING OF $10,000. PLAINTIFFS HAVE SHOWN THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THEIR CLAIM FOR $5,968,702. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO ATTACH THE CORRESPONDENCE FOR THE EARNOUT COMPENSATION FOR 1Q2015 DOES NOT UNDERMINE THE FACT THAT THEY HAVE ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THEIR ENTITLEMENT TO THAT COMPENSATION. NOR DOES MR. SIMKIN'S FEBRUARY 24, 2016 LETTER SHOW THAT THE AMOUNT THAT MR. SIMKIN SEEKS TO HAVE PAID DIRECTLY TO OTHERS IS NOT OWED BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFFS. BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN HOW IT MIGHT BE DAMAGED BY THE GRANTING OF THIS MOTION AND A SUBSEQUENT DETERMINATION IN THEIR FAVOR, THERE IS NO BASIS TO INCREASE THE STATUTORY MINIMUM UNDERTAKING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-08-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Plaintiff Fortis Advisors, Llc'S Application For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,968,702

Appearances: Hayes P. Hyde of Goodwin Proctor (415.733.6000) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Plaintiffs must post an undertaking of $10,000. Plaintiffs have shown the probable validity of their claim for $5,968,702. Plaintiff's failure to attach the correspondence for the earnout compensation for 1Q2015 does not undermine the fact that they have established the probable validity of their entitlement to that compensation. Nor does Mr. Simkin's February 24, 2016 letter show that the amount that Mr. Simkin seeks to have paid directly to others is not owed by defendant to plaintiffs. Because defendant has not shown how it might be damaged by the granting of this motion and a subsequent determination in their favor, there is no basis to increase the statutory minimum undertaking. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued to April 8, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
